seoTitle: Rohm News | Product Announcements, Technology Updates | LiTong
seoDescription: Latest news and updates from Rohm including new product announcements, technology breakthroughs, and industry events.

faqs.question: What types of news does LiTong publish about Rohm?
faqs.answer: LiTong publishes comprehensive news about Rohm including new product announcements for SiC MOSFETs, SBDs, and power modules; technology updates on wide bandgap semiconductor innovations; application success stories in EV, solar, and industrial markets; industry event coverage from trade shows and conferences; supply chain updates and capacity expansion news; partnership announcements with automotive and industrial OEMs; technical webinars and training events.
faqs.decisionGuide: Subscribe to our newsletter to receive the latest Rohm news and product updates.

(6) Events - Attend webinars and trade shows. (7) Direct contact - Reach out to LiTong sales team.
faqs.decisionGuide: Subscribe to LiTong newsletter and follow our social media for timely product updates.

faqs.question: Does LiTong host technical webinars about Rohm products?
faqs.answer: Yes, LiTong hosts regular Rohm technical webinars: (1) Product training - Deep dives on new devices. (2) Application workshops - EV, solar, and industrial topics. (3) Design tutorials - Gate drive, thermal, and layout guidance. (4) Case studies - Real-world application success stories. (5) Q&A sessions - Live interaction with FAE team. (6) Recordings - On-demand access to past webinars. (7) Registration - Free registration through LiTong website.
faqs.decisionGuide: Register for upcoming webinars or access recorded sessions on demand.

news.title: Rohm Announces 4th Generation SiC MOSFETs with Industry-Leading Rds(on)
news.summary: Rohm unveils next-generation trench-gate SiC MOSFETs delivering 40% lower Rds(on) than previous generation for EV and industrial applications.
content: Rohm Semiconductor has announced its fourth-generation SiC MOSFET technology, representing a significant advancement in wide bandgap semiconductor performance. The new Gen 4 devices deliver industry-leading performance with 40% lower on-resistance compared to the current generation.

The Gen 4 devices feature enhanced trench-gate structure with optimized cell design, resulting in ultra-low Rds(on) while maintaining excellent switching characteristics. The SCT4xxx series will be available in 650V and 1200V ratings.

Key improvements include further reduced conduction losses, enhanced ruggedness with improved short-circuit withstand capability, and maintained easy gate drive compatibility. The devices maintain full AEC-Q101 qualification.

Rohm expects to begin sampling Gen 4 devices in Q2 2024, with production ramp beginning in Q4 2024. LiTong will have evaluation kits and samples available for qualified customers. Contact your LiTong FAE for early access opportunities.
news.author: LiTong Technical Team

faqs.question: What are the key improvements in Rohm Gen 4 SiC MOSFETs?
faqs.answer: Gen 4 key improvements: (1) Rds(on) - 40% lower than Gen 3. (2) Cell design - Optimized trench-gate structure. (3) Ruggedness - Enhanced short-circuit capability. (4) Efficiency - Higher system efficiency. (5) Temperature - 175°C capability maintained. (6) Drive - Still easy gate drive compatible. (7) Portfolio - 650V and 1200V options. Significant performance advancement.
faqs.decisionGuide: Gen 4 offers best-in-class Rds(on); plan migration for new designs starting Q4 2024.

faqs.question: When will Gen 4 devices be available for sampling?
faqs.answer: Gen 4 availability: (1) Sampling - Q2 2024 for qualified customers. (2) Evaluation kits - Available with samples. (3) Production - Q4 2024 production ramp. (4) Full portfolio - Complete range by Q1 2025. (5) Qualification - AEC-Q101 before production. Contact LiTong for early access.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong now to join early access program for Gen 4 sampling.

news.title: Rohm SiC Powers New Global EV Platform
news.summary: Major global automotive OEM selects Rohm SiC MOSFETs for next-generation EV platform with multi-million unit forecast.
content: A major global automotive OEM has selected Rohm SiC MOSFETs for its next-generation electric vehicle platform. The platform will utilize Rohm's SCT3xxx series devices in traction inverters, onboard chargers, and DC-DC converters.

The design win represents one of the largest SiC deployments in the automotive industry, with projected volumes exceeding 5 million vehicles over the platform lifetime. Rohm's mass production track record and automotive quality were key factors in the selection.

The platform will leverage Rohm's industry-leading low Rds(on) and easy gate drive compatibility to achieve 99%+ inverter efficiency. The 800V architecture will use 1200V SiC MOSFETs with Kelvin source packages.
LiTong is supporting this program with dedicated FAE resources, local inventory, and technical support. Contact LiTong to learn how Rohm SiC can benefit your EV designs.
news.author: LiTong Automotive Team

faqs.question: What Rohm devices are used in this EV platform?
faqs.answer: EV platform devices: (1) Traction inverter - SCT3080KL 1200V SiC MOSFETs. (2) OBC - SCT3022AL 650V devices. (3) DC-DC - Various ratings. (4) Voltage - 1200V for 800V battery. (5) Temperature - 175°C capable. (6) Qualification - Full AEC-Q101. Rohm provides complete EV solution.
faqs.decisionGuide: Similar device families available for your EV designs; contact FAE for recommendations.

faqs.question: What does this design win demonstrate about Rohm?
faqs.answer: Design win significance: (1) Mass production - Proven capability. (2) Quality - Automotive grade. (3) Scale - Multi-million units. (4) Reliability - Track record. (5) Support - Global FAE. (6) Innovation - Leading technology. (7) Trust - Major OEM confidence. Validates Rohm as top-tier supplier.
faqs.decisionGuide: Demonstrates Rohm's capability for high-volume automotive production.

news.title: Rohm SiC Enables Record 99.5% Efficiency Solar Inverter
news.summary: Leading inverter manufacturer achieves breakthrough 99.5% peak efficiency using Rohm SiC MOSFETs and SBDs.
content: A leading solar inverter manufacturer has achieved a breakthrough 99.5% peak efficiency in its new 250kW utility-scale string inverter using Rohm SiC power devices. The design utilizes SCT3xxx series MOSFETs and SCH series SBDs.

The record efficiency was enabled by Rohm's industry-leading low Rds(on) MOSFETs combined with zero-recovery SBDs. The inverter operates at 100kHz switching frequency, enabling compact magnetics and reduced system cost.
The 1500V DC input design targets utility-scale solar installations. The SiC-based design also offers improved reliability and reduced cooling requirements compared to silicon IGBT solutions.
LiTong provided technical support throughout the development, including device selection guidance and thermal design review. Contact LiTong for support on your solar inverter designs.
news.author: LiTong Renewable Energy Team

faqs.question: Which Rohm devices enable this record efficiency?
faqs.answer: Record efficiency devices: (1) MOSFETs - SCT3xxx series for switching. (2) SBDs - SCH series for rectification. (3) Voltage - 1200V-1700V for 1500V systems. (4) Rds(on) - Ultra-low for minimal losses. (5) Recovery - Zero for SBDs. (6) Modules - For high power. (7) Efficiency - 99.5% peak. Rohm SiC enables record performance.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use Rohm SCT MOSFETs and SCH SBDs for highest efficiency designs.

faqs.question: What switching frequency is used?
faqs.answer: Switching frequency: (1) Inverter - 100kHz operation. (2) PFC - 70kHz boost stage. (3) Magnetics - 50% smaller than IGBT. (4) Losses - Low despite high frequency. (5) EMI - Managed with filtering. (6) Efficiency - 99.5% at 100kHz. (7) Size - Compact design. High frequency enables compact design.
faqs.decisionGuide: 100kHz switching enables 50% magnetics reduction while maintaining 99.5% efficiency.

news.title: Rohm Expands SiC Production Capacity by 50%
news.summary: Rohm announces major capacity expansion to meet growing demand from EV and renewable energy markets.
content: Rohm Semiconductor announced today a 50% capacity expansion at its SiC manufacturing facilities to meet rapidly growing demand from electric vehicle and renewable energy markets.
The expansion includes additional SiC crystal growth capacity, wafer fabrication equipment, and module assembly lines. The increased capacity will come online in phases throughout 2024 and 2025.

This expansion reinforces Rohm's commitment to supporting customer growth and maintaining supply stability. The vertically integrated manufacturing ensures quality control from crystal to finished device.
LiTong customers will benefit from improved lead times and supply assurance. Contact your LiTong representative to discuss long-term supply agreements and capacity allocation.
news.author: LiTong Supply Chain Team

faqs.question: How will the capacity expansion affect lead times?
faqs.answer: Capacity expansion impact: (1) Lead times - Gradual improvement starting Q3 2024. (2) High-volume - Priority allocation for committed programs. (3) Standard products - Improved availability. (4) Samples - Faster delivery. (5) Forecast - Better planning with forecast. Expect gradual improvement as capacity ramps.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong to discuss long-term agreements for priority allocation.

faqs.question: What products will benefit most?
faqs.answer: Products benefiting: (1) Automotive SiC - EV traction and OBC devices. (2) Popular parts - High-volume SCT series. (3) Power modules - BSM series. (4) Standard voltages - 650V and 1200V. (5) AEC-Q101 - Automotive qualified. (6) New products - Gen 4 when released. High-volume standard products see greatest improvement.
faqs.decisionGuide: Standard automotive and industrial products benefit most; contact LiTong for specific availability.

news.title: Rohm to Showcase Latest SiC Innovations at PCIM Europe 2024
news.summary: Visit LiTong and Rohm at PCIM Europe 2024 to see live demonstrations of Gen 4 SiC MOSFETs and EV reference designs.
content: Rohm Semiconductor and LiTong will showcase the latest SiC innovations at PCIM Europe 2024. Visit us at Hall 7, Booth 320 to see live demonstrations and speak with our technical experts.

Highlights will include live demonstrations of the new Gen 4 SiC MOSFET technology, showcasing 40% lower Rds(on) than current generation. Visitors can see switching demonstrations comparing Rohm SiC to silicon IGBTs.

The booth will also feature a complete EV traction inverter reference design, demonstrating the system-level benefits of Rohm SiC technology. Technical experts will be available to discuss your specific application requirements.
LiTong FAEs will be present to discuss your projects and provide local support information. Schedule a meeting with our team in advance or stop by the booth during exhibition hours.
news.author: LiTong Marketing Team

faqs.question: Where and when is PCIM Europe 2024?
faqs.answer: PCIM Europe 2024 details: (1) Location - Nuremberg, Germany. (2) Dates - June 11-13, 2024. (3) Venue - Exhibition Centre Nuremberg. (4) Hours - 9:00-18:00 daily. (5) Rohm booth - Hall 7, Booth 320. (6) Registration - Free online. Plan your visit.
faqs.decisionGuide: Register online and visit Rohm booth 320 in Hall 7.

faqs.question: What products will be demonstrated?
faqs.answer: Booth demonstrations: (1) Gen 4 SiC - Latest generation devices. (2) Switching demos - Live SiC vs IGBT comparison. (3) EV inverter - Complete traction inverter reference. (4) SBDs - SCH series diodes. (5) Modules - BSM series. (6) Tools - Design calculators. See live demonstrations.
faqs.decisionGuide: Visit booth for live demos and technical discussions.

news.title: Rohm Receives Quality Excellence Award from Major OEM
news.summary: Rohm recognized for zero defect quality performance by leading automotive OEM.
content: Rohm Semiconductor announced today it has received a Quality Excellence Award from a leading global automotive OEM, recognizing Rohm's zero defect quality performance in SiC device supply.

The award reflects Rohm's commitment to quality excellence, with zero PPM (parts per million) defect rate over the past 12 months of mass production supply. Rohm's IATF 16949 certified manufacturing and rigorous quality control were key factors.
This recognition adds to Rohm's growing list of quality awards from major automotive customers. The company's zero defect target and continuous improvement culture ensure consistent product quality.
LiTong provides full supply chain support for automotive customers including quality documentation, PPAP support, and traceability records. Contact LiTong for your automotive SiC requirements.
news.author: LiTong Quality Team

faqs.question: What does zero PPM mean?
faqs.answer: Zero PPM significance: (1) PPM - Parts per million defect rate. (2) Zero PPM - No defects in millions of devices. (3) Quality - Exceptional manufacturing. (4) Reliability - Proven in field. (5) Trust - Customer confidence. (6) Standard - Rohm quality target. (7) Award - Industry recognition. Highest quality achievement.
faqs.decisionGuide: Zero PPM demonstrates Rohm's commitment to quality excellence.

faqs.question: What quality systems does Rohm have?
faqs.answer: Rohm quality systems: (1) IATF 16949 - Automotive quality. (2) ISO 9001 - General quality. (3) AEC-Q101 - Device qualification. (4) Zero defect - Quality target. (5) Traceability - Full lot tracking. (6) Testing - 100% screening. (7) Continuous improvement - Ongoing. Comprehensive quality management.
faqs.decisionGuide: Rohm's quality systems ensure consistent automotive-grade reliability.
